name: recovery-authority
description: Give Codex consequence awareness, proven recovery, and reviewed multi-effect sagas.

interface.longDescription: Maps consequences, restore-tests destructive effects, and composes independent proofs into one reviewed manifest with ordered commit and reverse recovery.
defaultPrompt: Safely delete these files with a recovery proof.
Orient to the consequences of this cleanup command before running it.
Prepare one recovery manifest for these independent destructive effects.
